name: python3-colorlog
title: python3-colorlog
summary: formatter to use with the logging module of Python 3
description:
formatter to use with the logging module of Python 3
python-colorlog allows colors to be placed in the format string, which is
mostly useful when paired with a StreamHandler that is outputting to a
terminal. This is accomplished by adding a set of terminal color codes to the
record before it is used to format the string.
.
This is the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-colorlog because formatter to use with the logging module of Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-colorlog as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-colorlog with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-colorlog --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
